100130.name: Simple Spiritron Dress: Invisible Air
100130.detail: The King of Knights' Noble Phantasm of the wind. Mostly used to make the sacred sword invisible.

comments.comment:
Legendary King of Britain, and the King of Knights.
Her childhood name was Altria, but she has been known as King Arthur since her coronation.
At a time when chivalry was dying like a flower wilting away, she brought momentary peace and the last bit of prosperity to Britain with her sacred sword in hand.
In history books Arthur is male, but in this world she is a woman in disguise.

Height/Weight: 154cm, 42kg
Origin: Legend of King Arthur
Region: England
Alignment: Lawful-Good
Sub-Attribute: Earth
Gender: Female
Does not know how to react to affection since she has been pretending to be a man.

An idealistic king who believes a good living and a good life is all anyone needs.
Protects the weak, punishes the strong, and is an all around a completely faultless person.
Calm and steady, she is always serious and a model human being.
...But, even though she doesn't say it out loud, she hates losing.
She doesn't go easy on herself, and feels great remorse when she loses.

Charisma: B
A natural born leader to guide armies.
Improves her own army's strengths on the battlefield.
Swears by complete honesty and selfless devotion.
Knights kneel to her justness, and the people can survive any hardship with her hope.
Her path of kingship is not to rule over a handful of the strong, but to save many of the poor.

『Excalibur』
Rank: A++
NP Type: Anti-Fortress
Sword of Promised Victory.
A weapon not forged by man, but a Divine Construct forged within the Planet.
The Noble Phantasm that is greatest of all sacred swords.
The true power of the sword lies within its sheath, which is said to be lost forever.

The Legend of King Arthur marks the end of the era of knights.
King Arthur repelled many foreign enemies, but was unable to save Britain.
Due to the betrayal of Mordred, one of the Knights of the Round Table, the country was split into two and the Knights' castle Camelot lost its gleam.

King Arthur defeated Mordred on the Hill of Camlann, but she suffered fatal wounds and fell to her knees. Before her last breath, she entrusted her sacred sword to her last confidante Bedivere, and left the human realm. After death, she was taken to utopia... Avalon, a paradise that exists beyond this realm. It is said she will return to save Britain once again in the distant future.

voiceLines.name: Birthday
voiceLines.subtitle:
Happy birthday, Master.
I hope you have a wonderful day.

voiceLines.name: During an Event
voiceLines.subtitle: Hmm. Feels like our hard work is paying off... Let's see where this goes.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Heading into battle? Then allow me to join you.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Trainings everyday, Master.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Servants exist to serve their Masters, but I hope we can work together in good faith.

voiceLines.name: Likes
voiceLines.subtitle: Something I like... Sorry, I can't think of anything.

voiceLines.name: Dislikes
voiceLines.subtitle: I can't think of anything I hate... How embarrassing...

voiceLines.name: About the Holy Grail
voiceLines.subtitle:
I have my own thoughts of the quest for Holy Grails, but that's all in the past.
If something is evil, I must correct its path myself.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
This is the battle to save all humans.
Our task is of the utmost importance, Master.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
Why was I dressed as a man, you ask?
In my time, only men have royal authority. I couldn't protect anything as a maiden.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
But...you know. I dreamed about it sometimes.
What kind of life I'd have lived if I hadn't pulled the king's sword out.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
You know of Merlin?
He's a mischievous but reliable wizard.
We'd be much better off with him on our side...

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
I feel comfortable with your instructions.
There is a strange gentleness to it.
If my sword can aid you, Master, I'll do everything in my power to help.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
Forming a contract with the King of Heroes... Impressive.
He...is a Heroic Spirit with problems, to be sure, but his abilities are unparalleled.
You'll get used to him sooner or later.
Well, I will never get used to him though.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
The archer with a red coat... Fighting at his side brings both joy and sadness.
No matter where life takes him, he is a Heroic Spirit that is destined to fight forever...

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_G010]A little bit stronger, huh.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_G020]Let's grow together.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_G030]Seems like I've leveled up.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_G040]What do you think? I hope I can live up to your expectations.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100100_0_G050]Even if I return to being a king, our vows will not change. [delay 5.6]My sword is always with you. 
[id 100100_0_G051]Let's go, Master!

voiceLines.name: Summon
text: I ask of you, are you my Master?
voiceLines.subtitle: I ask of you, are you my Master?

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Let's begin, Master.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Give it everything you've got.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 3
voiceLines.subtitle: This is a battle, so I must destroy our enemies!

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 4
voiceLines.subtitle: Stay calm. We mustn't be careless.

voiceLines.name: Skill 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B080]All hands, prepare to charge!

voiceLines.name: Skill 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B090]I'll show you my strength!

voiceLines.name: Skill 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B480]You're not getting away!

voiceLines.name: Skill 4
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B490]I'll take them myself!

voiceLines.name: Skill 5
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B880]Bring victory to this path!

voiceLines.name: Skill 6
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B890]Sacred sword, release...

voiceLines.name: Command Card 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B180]Leave it to me.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B210]All right. Let's finish this.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B220]If that is your decision...

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100100_0_B230]This is a battle to save humanity.

voiceLines.name: Attack 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Hrmph!

voiceLines.name: Attack 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Hahh!

voiceLines.name: Attack 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Hyahhh!

voiceLines.name: Attack 4
voiceLines.subtitle: I'll cut them down!

voiceLines.name: Attack 5
voiceLines.subtitle: There's still more!

voiceLines.name: Attack 6
voiceLines.subtitle: Got you!

voiceLines.name: Attack 7
voiceLines.subtitle: Sei!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: O wind, whirl away!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: Strike Air!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: Let's go! Strike, Caliburn!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack 4
voiceLines.subtitle: Brilliant! And now, my reply!

voiceLines.name: Damage 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Attacks like this...

voiceLines.name: Damage 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Ugh!

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Not...like this...

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Sorry, Master...

voiceLines.name: Victory 1
voiceLines.subtitle: You still have much to learn.

voiceLines.name: Victory 2
voiceLines.subtitle: I cannot break my knightly vows.

voiceLines.name: Victory 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Take care of the wounded. The battle is not yet over.

voiceLines.name: Victory 4
voiceLines.subtitle: Are your supply lines still in place? Good.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100100_0_B050]Sheathed in the breath of the planet, a torrent of shining life.
[id 100100_0_B051]Feel its wrath.
[id 100100_0_B052]Excalibur!

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100100_0_B800]This light is the planet's hope...[delay 2.8]proof of the life that illuminates this world!
[id 100100_0_B801]Behold!
[id 100100_0_B802]Excalibur!

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100100_0_B810]This light is the planet's hope...[delay 2.7]proof of the life that illuminates this world!
[id 100100_0_B811]Let us end this!
[id 100100_0_B812]Excalibur!

100230.detail: The black knight stands firm, forever at the vanguard on the streets.

comments.comment:
Corrupted by the curse of the Holy Grail, this is the merciless side of the King of Knights. 
Or perhaps this is the true nature of the "Ideal King" that King Arthur sought to be. 
Altria controlled her own power and held back, but in this state, she wields her immense power without hesitation.

Height/Weight: 154cm, 42kg
Origin: Legend of King Arthur
Region: England
Alignment: Lawful-Evil
Sub-Attribute: Human
Gender: Female
A merciless tyrant. A gluttonous dragon.

The once shining armor has turned black and
is now heavier, but the added weight has increased her attack power.
However, her agility has gone down. 
With a ruthless cold persona, Altria seems
like a completely different person. But if you are willing to dig deeper, you will see that what lies at the bottom is still the same.

Mana Burst: A
Surrounds herself with magical energy on her weapon and body, and can instantly discharge it to improve her stats. Like jet
propulsion via magical energy.
Altria herself has normal muscular strength, but by using her overwhelming magical energy she can power up any and every activity to defeat many enemies.

『Excalibur Morgan』
Rank: A++
NP Type: Anti-Fortress
Sword of Promised Victory.
The sword shines with dark aura. Because
she wields the sacred sword as she sees fit
without controlling her power, the magical energy particles do not emit light, but darkness.
It is similar to the breath of the dragon Vortigern, which once revealed itself to protect the island of Britain.

Altria never took the path of evil in her life. But she did have doubts, worries, anger at herself, and sorrow for those around her.
This form is where the curse made those thoughts surface, and completely reversed her "principles."
Her objective and her ideals have not changed.
Normally Altria is kind and just, but this
Altria feels that oppression is also a path to obtain her ideals.

Perhaps due to the abnormal amount of magical energy she hosts, Altria eats a lot.
Even her tastes in food, what you could call someone's identity, changes. She spits out carefully crafted meals as disgusting, and munches down on immense amounts of junk food.
She eats terribly, but is very satisfied.
Eating this way is a kind of happiness.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
Don't mind me.
I am a woman who feels not of my follower's death, nor my people's suffering.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
...I am made out of a dragon to kill the vile King Vortigern.
I bear no shame for that mission to this day. That fool went out for wool and came home shorn.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
Need more excitement. I'm hungry. 
Make something, Master. I'll eat anything.
Huh? A hamburger?

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
Master... This lowly Servant is shamefully asking...
When are we gonna see some pancakes? You know, the king of junk food.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
Munch, munch... Munch, munch...
Huh? How long have you been there? Want more? A dozen more?
Fine. I'll forgive your rudeness. Sit over there. I might finally see you as my Master...

voiceLines.name: Conversation 1
voiceLines.subtitle: How long are we gonna rest? Let's go crush some weaklings.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 2
voiceLines.subtitle: I am no longer a king or knight. Just your Servant.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 3
voiceLines.subtitle: When you kneel before your enemy, I shall have your head. Until then, you can trust me.

voiceLines.name: Likes
voiceLines.subtitle: I like powerful things. Doesn't matter if its the mind or body.

voiceLines.name: Dislikes
voiceLines.subtitle: I hate weakness. I can't stand seeing someone frail of mind or body.

voiceLines.name: About the Holy Grail
voiceLines.subtitle: The Holy Grail. If it's real, I'll use it. If it's fake, I'll destroy it.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 7
voiceLines.subtitle:
Oh? Even that woman obsessed with skewering people is here.
Don't get the wrong idea. I'm not angry. I'm actually enjoying this.
She is well worth knocking down, in so many ways.
At least I will not be bored on our journey.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 8
voiceLines.subtitle:
Who the heck is that woman who shares my face, but is taller and flashier than I?
Huh? This Japanese swordmaster is the greatest possible version of herself? She loves oden and she's a Guardian of the Counter Force?
And she's an Alter... What in the world...?

voiceLines.name: Conversation 9
voiceLines.subtitle:
Are you serious? The Greek hunter's gone all dark.
Oh nothing... My mind was wandering.
Nothing wrong with showing off her feral side, but she needs to make it clear whether she's a cat or a boar.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 10
voiceLines.subtitle:
She's my older sister, she's like a mother to me, and she's like a mirror image of myself.
She may need to curse people to survive, but she is likely better suited to be king than me.
After all, she was far more beloved to all of Britain than I ever was.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 11
voiceLines.subtitle: The faerie king Oberon...is that really him? He seems to carry the air of a dragon more than a faerie...

voiceLines.name: During an Event
voiceLines.subtitle: I smell battle. It's reaping time, Master.

voiceLines.name: Birthday
voiceLines.subtitle: Your birthday? Good for you.

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_G010]...Satisfied?

voiceLines.name: Ascension 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_G020]...Not bad. Getting more magical energy is a good thing.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_G030]I'm seething with power... There's no need to hold back anymore.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_G040]More, Master. We've come this far, take responsibility to the very end.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100200_0_G050]Why the long face? I took off that heavy armor for you. 
[id 100200_0_G051]In that case, you know the fate that awaits, don't you? [delay 5]Devote your everything for me.

voiceLines.name: Summon
text:
...I have come in response to your summon.[r]
Are you the one who is to be my Master?
voiceLines.subtitle:
...I have come in response to your summon.
Are you the one who is to be my Master?

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Out of my face.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 2
voiceLines.subtitle: I'll crush you.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 3
voiceLines.subtitle: This is a good opportunity to educate you.

voiceLines.name: Skill 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_B080]...Away with you.

voiceLines.name: Skill 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_B090]How fragile!

voiceLines.name: Skill 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_B480]Hold back? You've got to be kidding.

voiceLines.name: Command Card 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_B190]Silence.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_B210]--Cry. It's time you come crashing down.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100200_0_B220]Consider this an honor.

voiceLines.name: Attack 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Hrmph!

voiceLines.name: Attack 2
voiceLines.subtitle: There.

voiceLines.name: Attack 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Don't resist.

voiceLines.name: Attack 4
voiceLines.subtitle: Front line, scatter!

voiceLines.name: Attack 5
voiceLines.subtitle: How do you feel?

voiceLines.name: Attack 6
voiceLines.subtitle: How disappointing.

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: I'll annihilate you.

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: Vortigern...!

voiceLines.name: Damage 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Nghh!

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 1
voiceLines.subtitle: ...Is this how it ends?

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 2
voiceLines.subtitle: ...I'll never forget this.

voiceLines.name: Victory 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Boring.

voiceLines.name: Victory 2
voiceLines.subtitle: I'll trample you.

voiceLines.name: Victory 3
voiceLines.subtitle: I will defeat the enemy. That's all there is to it.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100200_0_B050]Vortigern, Hammer of the Vile King, reverse the rising sun.
[id 100200_0_B051]Swallow the light, Excalibur Morgan!

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100200_0_B800]Sink into the mountain of corpses.
[id 100200_0_B801]Collapse...Excalibur Morgan!

voiceLines.name: About Spiritron Dress
voiceLines.overwriteName: About Spiritron Dress Pitch Black King of Knights Shinjuku 1999 Ver.
voiceLines.subtitle:
I can't show myself in front of the Round Table looking like this.
But I am neither king nor knight now, so I don't give a rat's ass if anyone's uncomfortable.
But now, we're heading out, Master.
A giant patty is calling my name.

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.overwriteName: Level up Pitch Black King of Knights Shinjuku 1999 Ver.

voiceLines.name: Unlock Wardrobe
voiceLines.overwriteName: Unlock Wardrobe Pitch Black King of Knights Shinjuku 1999 Ver.
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100200_11_G060]Good work. I'm not usually picky about my outfits, but this one's special.
[id 100200_11_G061]After all, the burgers here are delicious.
[id 100200_11_G062]Hm? Cavall II's whining.
[id 100200_11_G063]Unbelievable...that pyromaniac woman forgot to give him his breakfast...

comments.comment:
Pulling Caliburn the Sword of Selection out, this is the Altria who just started walking the path of kingship.
Because of such, she's still a half-boiled knight.
She's as fresh faced as a lily, and her eyes are filled with glimmering hope.
She walked across the country to experience many things, and left many adventures to tell.
Those saved by her praise her as the Princess Knight from her elegance.

Height/Weight: 154cm, 42kg
Origin: Legend of King Arthur
Region: England
Alignment: Lawful-Good
Sub-Attribute: Earth
Gender: Female
Training to be a king is rough, but if I can take care of my horses, I'm happy.

A romantic knight who betters herself daily to become the ideal king.
She is still half-boiled so she still acts like a girl, and her heart is filled with dreams and hope.
When she vacations in different countries, she spends her time with her brother-in-law Sir Kay, and their accompanying mage Merlin.
Things usually start with Altria making a fuss, then frustrating Merlin, and Kay picking up the pieces.

Intuition: B
Always "feels" the optimal flow for herself during battle.
Her honed sixth sense is almost precognition.
Reduces the effect of any interference to her sight and hearing.
However, having good hunches is not so good... she acutely picks up the worries of everyone she meets, so she ends up helping each and every person she comes across.

『Caliburn』
Rank: B (Conditionally A+)
NP Type: Anti-Personnel
Golden Sword of Assured Victory.
Originally a sword used to select a king, the "Anti-Personnel" is not against an enemy, but to one who will wield the sword in the future. If the wielder stays just as a king, and is finally deemed worthy, its strength will be appropriate for a sacred sword.

The destined child born to save Britain from its destruction and path to ruin. A "reincarnation of a dragon" created by the previous king Uther and the mage Merlin. This is why she is referred to as the Red Dragon that protects Britain.
Has the heart of a dragon, the highest rank of phantasmals, and the amount of magical energy that can be created within her body overwhelms all other Heroic Spirits.

Caliburn and Excalibur are different sacred swords.
Caliburn nurtures royalty, and raises Arthur into a king.
Originally, Caliburn was used for ceremonies.
Using this as a weapon by releasing its True Name can exert the same firepower as Excalibur, but the sword will not be able to withstand Altria's magical energy and will likely disintegrate.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
I'm still training.
I haven't achieved anything worthy to be called a Heroic Spirit, but I will do my best as a Saber.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
You're still growing, too, Master.
That's why it feels like I just gained a friend. Hehe, let's see who ends up being the best.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
I'm still working on my swordsmanship and have a long way to go to become a knight.
It's not just about skills, but mental fortitude as well. One day, I will have the strength worthy of the sword.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
Umm... I know I said "in the years to come" when you first summoned me, but I really didn't think we'd get this close.
Now, your presence alone is enough to give me strength, Master.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
I'm grateful, Master.
I may still be immature, but now I know the difference between what I should protect and what I want to protect. 
Oh? You feel the same? Hehe. It's like we're reading each other's minds.
Someday I will part ways with this sword, but please fight with me until then, Master.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
Resting too much isn't good for you, Master.
So let's work hard again today!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
You speak of kings and retainers?
Th-That's not happening anytime soon, and I'm not prepared in the slightest... S-Sorry!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
I am currently training. 
I will learn by your side, Master.

voiceLines.name: Likes
voiceLines.subtitle:
Things that I like? Well, I like village festivals and grooming horses.
I know I have to forget about all that, but I doubt I ever will.

voiceLines.name: Dislikes
voiceLines.subtitle:
Things I hate? There isn't any...but there is something I'm bad at.
I'm great at dancing with women but can't dance with men for the life of me...

voiceLines.name: About the Holy Grail
voiceLines.subtitle:
A Holy Grail that grants wishes, you say?
Such a thing would certainly come in handy.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 7
voiceLines.subtitle:
That person who's wearing that pretty violet outfit over there...
Oh, so her name is Medea.
I somehow feel closeness to her. And her title as a friendly witch is also lovely!
Surely she must be a gentle and delicate person.
There's no doubt she'll grow up to be a wonderful lady! Yep!
There's no way she would annoyingly curse enemies from afar!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 8
voiceLines.subtitle:
Thanks to Master X and Master, I've gotten confident with my Noble Phantasm!
One of these days I'll visit the Universe and eradicate all the evil Sabers with Master X!

voiceLines.name: During an Event
voiceLines.subtitle:
Seems that a major event is happening. We have to hurry before we're too late, Master...
Somehow, this reminds me of the time of Selection.

voiceLines.name: Birthday
voiceLines.subtitle:
It's your birthday? That calls for a celebration!
I'll bake a pie for you! Ah, but I'm not much of a cook... Please don't get your hopes up too much...

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100300_0_G010]Well? Do you think I've grown stronger?

voiceLines.name: Ascension 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100300_0_G020]Thank you for the precious resources, Master.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100300_0_G030]I'm a little faster now. 
This should help me move easier, Master.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100300_0_G040]I'm more about agility than strength...but still, this is too lightly dressed...
[id 100300_0_G041]But whatever makes you happy, Master. I'll always do my best!

voiceLines.name: Ascension 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100300_0_G050]I never thought my spirit would ascend this far.
Thank you, Master. [id 100300_0_G051]I may still be immature, but now [delay 2.1]I feel more confident about being chosen by the sacred sword.

voiceLines.name: Summon
text: It is nice to meet you, Master.

[r]
Since I am still in training, please call me Saber Lily.

[r]
I look forward to working with you in the years to come.

comments.comment:
A mighty emperor, and self-proclaimed "beauty in men's clothing," she is both narcissistic and selfish, but also bright and openhearted.
Her childish purity gained her the adoration of all her subjects.
Her True Name is Nero Claudius Caesar Augustus Germanicus, the fifth emperor of the Roman Empire.
She is an infamous tyrant whose entire life was colored by conspiracy and poison.

Height/Weight: 150cm, 42kg
Origin: History
Region: Rome
Alignment: Chaotic-Good
Sub-Attribute: Human
Gender: Female
Umu, leave everything to me!

Self-proclaimed artist, she has her own sense of aesthetics. 
Loves pretty boys and handsome old men. Loves pretty girls even more. 
Loves beautiful things regardless of what they are. 
Proclaims that she is the pinnacle of art, but also claims all sorts of people's lives
are beautiful as well.
...It goes without saying that the way she enjoys life is almost like herself, a beautifully bloomed rose.

Imperial Privilege: EX
Skills she normally wouldn't have can be
gained momentarily because she declared it.
This is the perfect skill for Nero who is the manifestation of passion.
She gains skills such as Riding, Swordsmanship, Arts, Charisma, Tactics...etc.
If the skill is above Rank A, the physical
burden (such as Divinity) is gained as well.

『Aestus Domus Aurea』
Rank: B
NP Type: Anti-Formation
Invitation to the Golden Debauchery Theater.
An absolute emperor's field that fulfills her desires. A magical recreation of the theatre "Domus Aurea" she designed herself and built in Rome when she was alive. It creates a battlefield that works to her advantage.

The emperor who put the happiness and prosperity of the Roman people first.
Also enjoyed living life, especially when it came to musical theater.
She prided herself on her absolute superiority.
(*it was only her own confidence.)
Those who heard her sing were traumatized for three days and three nights, and saw dreams (nightmares) of roses.

The emperor that suppressed all religious forces and the Roman Senate around 50~60 AD.
Called a tyrant in the days of Rome because of her position against the senate and the oppression of the Christians.
From those tales, she was often compared to the Beast of 666 that destroyed a city in the New Testament, or the Whore of Babylon...

voiceLines.name: Birthday
voiceLines.subtitle: Your birthday! An auspicious occasion, indeed! Oh? So you're not going to have the whole country celebrate it?

voiceLines.name: During an Event
voiceLines.subtitle: I have a hunch that new attractions await! Let's make haste, Master!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 1
voiceLines.subtitle: I'm tired of waiting. To battle!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 2
voiceLines.subtitle: I might be the emperor, but I'm also your humble Servant. I take both jobs very seriously.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Umu. Use me as you will! I'll take good care of you!

voiceLines.name: Likes
voiceLines.subtitle: What do I like? Well, myself, of course! I'm the flower of Olympia, after all!

voiceLines.name: Dislikes
voiceLines.subtitle: What do I hate? Temperance, treachery, and ruin!

voiceLines.name: About the Holy Grail
voiceLines.subtitle: The Holy Grail... Hmm... What a terrible name... Never mention it in my presence again! It's only going to make my headache worse.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
I don't need a genius mage for a Master.
I just need them to be beautiful.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
There sure is a lot of tension in your voice.
I kind of like it. I want you to keep saying my name, and I want you to depend on me the most.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
I know I said you didn't need to be a genius, but don't you think you're a bit, well, weak?
That you can barely swing a sword is concerning. You know I can't hold your hand forever, don't you?

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
I've made up my mind. You're going to send me into battle now.
Umu, I'd like that! I'd really like that! Then I'll always be able to protect you, Master!

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
I feel complete. What a blessed emperor I am.
That I was able to meet such a brave hero in a world so far from Rome...
Huh? Of whom do I speak?
You, you idiot! I'm proud to call you my Master!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 4
voiceLines.subtitle: Insolent Red Lancer. Disappearing for a time only to come back stronger... I'll be damned if I'm going to go down without a fight. Master! Make me a vocal training room!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 5
voiceLines.subtitle: That Caster in a kimono... Casko. I go way back with her. Still, while I may not hate her, that doesn't mean we're not rivals.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 6
voiceLines.subtitle:
My uncle!
So young...and more than a bit violent.
I've seen him defeat enemies with just his fist. I wish I had an outfit with a red cape like his.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 7
voiceLines.subtitle:
The white warrior princess... Altera, right?
Hmm... For some reason, her name conjures up a bigger, badder, last boss kind of image... Hehehe.
Whatever may come, it's a good thing she looks happy.

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_0_G010]I can grow so much stronger than this!

voiceLines.name: Ascension 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_0_G020]I am beyond genius, if I do say so myself!

voiceLines.name: Ascension 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_0_G030]Hmm. I like this outfit.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_0_G040]U-umu... Overdoing it a bit, eh?

voiceLines.name: Ascension 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100500_0_G050]Umu! This is the Flowery Imperium, an ovation of roses!
[delay 5.7]I am content! Soon, there will be nothing left to lament!

voiceLines.name: Summon
text: Servant Saber.[r]
Nero Claudius, I have arrived in response to your call![r]
Umu, you have chosen the right one![r]
You sure know how to tell the difference!
voiceLines.subtitle:
Servant Saber.
Nero Claudius, I have arrived in response to your call!
Umu, you have chosen the right one!
You sure know how to tell the difference!

voiceLines.name: About the Event 1
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
Well done! That was a fierce fight!
You can't be stingy forever, so don't hesitate to give it a spin. Hmm. What do you think you will get?

voiceLines.name: About the Event 2
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
Can I give it a spin? I'm going to spin it, okay?
You know, it's as if we've already won!

voiceLines.name: About the Event 3
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
Victory. Win battles and reap rewards...
That's what it means to be a hero!
Everyone is happy! I'm happy!

voiceLines.name: About the Event 4
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
Behold the prizes I've prepared!
This is the very best Rome has to offer!
...You must forgive the occasional bad roll.

voiceLines.name: About the Event 5
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 5
voiceLines.subtitle: I know it's hard to take your eyes off the prize, but you should try to keep up with the news and information. You never know when you might find something good.

voiceLines.name: About the Event 6
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 6
voiceLines.subtitle:
The flower festival has ended. I'm beside myself with grief...
But what's done is done, I say. I'm sure we'll meet again.
That said, you didn't forget to exchange prizes, did you? You know it's a wasted opportunity if you don't, right?

voiceLines.name: About the Event 7
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2018 7
voiceLines.subtitle:
All roads lead to Rome...
The most recent festival may be over, but I'm sure there will be another.
Until then... See you next time, Rome!

voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 1

Now, the moment you've been waiting for. Time for rewards!

voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 2

Now, render unto me the spoils of your battles!

voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Battling at the Colosseum is exciting, but THIS is exciting too, don't you think? You call this being on the edge of your seat, right?

voiceLines.name: About the Event (Second Block) 4
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
Clang, clang...roll...
A spinning roulette is a wonderful thing. Its endless, mindless spinning...superb...
If only it gave out Grand Prizes more often, it would be even better...

voiceLines.name: About the Event (Second Block) 5
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
Nero Fest is here for greedy Masters.
As long as time permits, and as long as you have enough fruit, you should try to get everything!

voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 6
voiceLines.subtitle:
Sorry to say this, but this emperor's special shop is closing up.
...Thank you for your patronage, brief though it was.
Umu, it's quite sad to think of it.

voiceLines.subtitle: We'll win this together!

[id 100500_0_B050]Behold my talent and listen to the thunderous applause!
[id 100500_0_B051]Then praise me! Praise my Golden Theater!
[id 100500_0_B052]Laus St. Claudius!

A spinning roulette is a wonderful thing. Its endless, mindless spinning...superb...
If only it gave out Grand Prizes more often, it would be even better...

voiceLines.name: About the Event (Second Block) 5
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
Nero Fest is here for greedy Masters.
As long as time permits, and as long as you have enough fruit, you should try to get everything!

voiceLines.name: About the Event (Second Block) 6
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 6
voiceLines.subtitle:
Sorry to say this, but this emperor's special shop is closing up.
...Thank you for your patronage, brief though it was.
Umu, it's quite sad to think of it.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Victory to the Red Team!

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Is my number bib on?

voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_11_B080]Appreciate the support!

voiceLines.name: Skill 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_11_B480]Relay races need a baton!

voiceLines.name: Command Card 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_11_B180]On your mark, get set, go!

voiceLines.name: Command Card 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_11_B190]First place is mine!

voiceLines.name: Command Card 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100500_11_B200]Just you watch.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card

voiceLines.name: Victory 2

voiceLines.name: Shop Voice (Second Block) 1
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 7
voiceLines.subtitle:
Rome's great appreciation sale! Nero Fest is now in its third year!
I appreciate everyone's patronage!

voiceLines.name: Shop Voice (Second Block) 2
voiceLines.overwriteName: The Return of Nero Fest - Autumn 2019 8
voiceLines.subtitle:
Look at this incredible selection!
I'm sure even our Holy Progenitor, Romulus, would approve!

Don't hesitate to take everything.
Collect all the items and use them whenever you like!

What a promising selection!

♪Should Rome be forgot,
my name is Nero...♪

Next year, we'll have infinite Guts!

comments.comment:
Putting on a new dress, the Emperor of Roses is clad in pure white.
As her dress changes, her attitude changes as well, and even her battle style is different from her regular self.
Her beloved sword, Aestus Estus, senses that, and changes its color from crimson to platinum.

Height/Weight: 150cm, 42kg
Origin: History
Region: Rome
Alignment: Chaotic-Bride
Sub-Attribute: Human
Gender: Female
Umu, this is my long-awaited wedding dress!

Migraine: B
A curse inherited from when she was alive.
Due having chronic migraines, her success rate of skills dealing with mental status declines considerably.
Nero is a (self-proclaimed) artist, but due to this skill, it is difficult for her to completely exhibit her talent.

『Fax Caelestis』
Rank: B+
NP Type: Anti-Personnel
Star-Rushing Rose of Closure.
A special skill derived from Aestus Domus Aurea.
In reality, this is merely a sword-technique, but with the perfect marriage of flashiness, elegance, and the impact of the wedding dress, this should be a Noble Phantasm, right? Since she saw it that way, it came to be treated as a Noble Phantasm.

It is not like there were feelings of jealousy about the new skill of that blue fox Caster.

In the Year 59 (some say 60), to pay homage to the Olympics held in Greece, she started the "Nero Fest," to be held once every five years.
The competition held three divisions of music, horse-riding, gymnastics, and she participated in a number of those.
In the Year 69, she was dethroned by the rebellion and fled from Rome.
During her escape, she realized she couldn't get away and decided to end her life.

Ascending to the throne at 17, she gained overwhelming popularity with the people for her generous policies.
She's also well versed in foreign politics, and the popularity towards Rome in the England (Britannia) of later years was due to Nero's diplomacy.
Persia also frequently praised Nero, and even after her death, they still showed respect towards Rome because it was Nero's country.

In her former life, Nero remained without a spouse until death, and even after becoming a Servant, she still hasn't encountered that special someone throughout all her battles.

In other words, this is a form that's only in her dreams, a place where she did not join the Holy Grail War in a certain virtual world.

voiceLines.name: Birthday
voiceLines.subtitle:
Your birthday, huh? Then stay inside.
Only a fool would refuse to spend some quality time with me when I'm wearing an outfit like this.

voiceLines.name: During an Event
voiceLines.subtitle:
Ooh! Seems like things are heating up!
To arms, Master! Let's crack some skulls!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
Hmm. We're starting to run low on funds, Master.
Get out there and earn us some more.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
Marriage talk, huh!
I try to improve myself every day, dreaming that the day will come!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
You don't think this is the right outfit for a fight?
But a bridal gown by definition is a woman's battle garb... Just you wait, Master. I'll protect you like never before.

voiceLines.name: Likes
voiceLines.subtitle:
Me of course!
...Or at least I'd like to say as much, but that would be a lie with me in this outfit...
But maybe anything that shares a connection with me. I think that's what matters most.

voiceLines.name: Dislikes
voiceLines.subtitle:
What do I hate? It goes without saying.
Anyone who cheats deserves to go straight to hell.

voiceLines.name: About the Holy Grail
voiceLines.subtitle:
The Holy Grail... Hmm... What a terrible name...
Try not to mention it in my presence... It's only going to make my headache worse.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
You want to know why I changed into a wedding dress?
Fufufu. Do you really have to ask?
You know me! I did it because I wanted to!

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
But you know, I don't really know what it means to be a bride.
Hmm... It's like floating in air, but it's far from relaxing. You just can't shake the feeling that you're missing something...

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
Huh? So what's missing is everyday routine?
I see... Then I'll give cooking a try.
Trust me on this. I'm great at everything I do, and I know what you like.
I mean, uh, you like octopus, right?

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
How many times have we practiced so far?
Cooking, shopping, theater visits, and trifle disagreements here and there...
U-Umu. There's nothing wrong with that. In fact, I think it's a good thing. I have a feeling that I'm finally pretty close to understanding what it means to be a bride.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
...Umu, that was a really nice dream. So satisfying.
But "was" doesn't quite fit. Our contract is going to continue into the future. It's a very happy ending.
However, I don't think it's good for me to call you "Master" forever. We should come up with pet names for each other.
I know it lacks originality, but I think I'll call you "darling"!

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100600_0_G010]I'll grow stronger and more gorgeous than ever!

voiceLines.name: Ascension 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100600_0_G020]Umu, indeed. The more blessings of the bells, the better.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100600_0_G030]U-Umu...
I don't mind growing stronger, [delay 4]but my dress is starting to feel a bit tight...

voiceLines.name: Ascension 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100600_0_G040]Fufufu, I changed clothes again.[delay 5]
I tried to look more like a bride. What do you think?

voiceLines.name: Ascension 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100600_0_G050]Ohh... This is the pinnacle of Rome, [delay 3]the most beautiful combat wedding dress in the world!
[id 100600_0_G051]You and I are bound to turn some heads!

voiceLines.name: Summon
text:
Umu... I am back with a new dress![r]
Call me Bride Saber, or Nero Bride!
voiceLines.subtitle:
Umu... I am back with a new dress!
Call me Bride Saber, or Nero Bride!

comments.comment:
One of the Knights of the Round Table from the Legend of King Arthur.
He is one of the oldest and most loyal knights serving under the King, staying with her until the very end.
He wields the holy sword of the sun, said to be the sister sword of Excalibur.
And thanks to the blessings of a saint, he won fame as a peerless knight who was unmatched under the light of sun.

Height/Weight: 180cm, 78kg
Origin: Legend of King Arthur
Region: Britain
Alignment: Lawful-Good
Sub-Attribute: Earth
Gender: Male
No matter what the job is, he handles it earnestly.
Even if it was something minor like collecting debts.

『Excalibur Galatine』
Rank: A+
NP Type: Anti-Army
The Revolving Sword of Victory.
The sword of the sun that has an artificial sun stored in its hilt.
Similar to the king's sacred sword Excalibur, this sister sword was also brought by the fairy "Lady of the Lake."
While the king and her sword receive the divine protection of the moon, Gawain and this sword receive the grace of the sun.

A knight in shining armor. A perfect gentleman with a perfect smile.
Despite his serious character, he has no gloomy aspects and treats everyone with honesty and sincerity.
He gets enraged from time to time but since he never holds any negative emotion such as hatred or jealousy, his attitude is refreshing no matter which battlefield he is on.
According to other knights of the Round Table, "it's almost a talent to be as likeable as him."

Because of his good heart and natural airheadedness, people could never bring themselves to envy him despite his being blessed with both unparalleled talents and a good family.
He's a loyal knight, and his loyalty to the king is strong as iron.
To Gawain, his only wish is to become a sword for the king, to serve for the king.
For those who does not know his true nature, they might mistaken his loyalty as blind faith.

Numeral of the Saint: EX
Sir Gawain's special ability.
In the 3 hours between 9 AM and noon, and in the 3 hours from 3 PM until dusk, his strength triples.
The skill is the manifestation of "3", a Celtic holy number.

He may have had many brothers at the Round Table, but it was said that he was especially close with his younger sister Gareth.
After Lancelot mercilessly killed Gareth, Gawain's rage eventually led to King Arthur's demise, which became Gawain's greatest regret.
Gawain was never close to his other relatives among the Knights of the Round Table. He was separated from Agravain who was sent to live with Morgan when they were young, and had never properly been introduced to his half-sibling Mordred by the time they came to blows in their final battle.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
Seeing this room proves it to me.
You're an honest individual with nothing to hide.
I'm quite confident that I will be of great service to you.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
I had siblings, you know.
And they were outstanding knights.
Unfortunately, we were forced to part ways abruptly.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
I believe that I've grown accustomed to fighting formidable foes.
Britain has faced threats from both inside and out, after all.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
Once when I was in Britain...
I fought an extremely tough opponent named the Green Knight. He was a pitiable man, turned into a monster by Morgan's magic.
It was a battle meant to test my mettle.

voiceLines.name: Bond Level 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
I was unsuccessful in my trial against the Green Knight...
But King Arthur praised me anyway.
He called me the most honorable knight.
I will never forget that moment, not for as long as I live.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
Then let's be off.
I only ask that we avoid traveling at night!

voiceLines.name: Conversation 2
voiceLines.subtitle:
I shall serve under you as a knight. 
Just as I once offered my sword to other masters.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 3
voiceLines.subtitle:
I will be of service to you.
Yes, that's an oath I already made.
And I will never break that oath...
Ever.

voiceLines.name: Likes
voiceLines.subtitle:
What do I value, you ask?
Even now...
I still have not forgotten how I offered up my sword to the King of Knights as a pledge of my allegiance.

voiceLines.name: Dislikes
voiceLines.subtitle:
What do I try to avoid, you ask?
I don't think it's worth discussing.
If I have to name one, I'd say... maybe older wom... uh... sorry, end of discussion.

voiceLines.name: About the Holy Grail
voiceLines.subtitle:
The Holy Grail?
I was once unsuccessful in a quest to obtain it.
Only one of the Knights of the Round Table was ever able to get to the Grail…

voiceLines.name: Conversation 4
voiceLines.subtitle:
I feel the presence of a king.
No, it couldn't be... Could it?

voiceLines.name: Conversation 5
voiceLines.subtitle:
There is no mistaking it.
This overwhelming feeling of nostalgia.
My proud Knights of the Round Table.
Except for you, Bors. Take a seat over there.
I must properly educate you on some matters.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 6
voiceLines.subtitle:
...Mordred.
How did that traitor become a Heroic Spirit?
...No, I can't allow myself to hold a grudge.
Whether good or evil, we must work together now...

voiceLines.name: Conversation 7
voiceLines.subtitle:
Sir Lancelot.
I understand your grief.
Neither of us were able to save our king, after all.
The truth is... It was immature of me not to forgive you.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 8
voiceLines.subtitle:
Ah, even Sir Bedivere's here!
He may be modest, claiming that he's "a Knight of the Round Table in name alone." But that is far from the truth.
He may seem gentle, but whenever he tries to stop Sir Tristan from his follies, his calm and sometimes harsh dealings send a chill down everyone's spine.
The more quiet the knight, the more terrifying his anger.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 9
voiceLines.subtitle:
Mhm. You must think Sir Tristan is some free-spirited poet, don't you, Master? And yes, you are correct. (Smiles) 
......... My apologies. I seemed to have caused an uncomfortable silence.
While Tristan may not say it out loud, he takes his art the most seriously of anyone at the Round Table. No matter what the situation, he will read even the wind into a poem in every waking moment. In other words, every waking moment is an opportunity to undergo harsh training for him.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 10
voiceLines.subtitle:
Gareth is my younger sister.
If she insists on fighting as a knight, then I have no authority to stop her.
That is as true now as it was then.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 11
voiceLines.subtitle:
No matter how great a king is, they still require aides or mages. This person was a mentor and a confidant to our king. I won't say anything else about that.
Then again...
If you have some sort of plan to teach Merlin a lesson, I would appreciate it if you would invite me. (Smiles)

voiceLines.name: Conversation 12
voiceLines.subtitle:
According to a Servant named BB, I apparently have some sort of connection with this Alter Ego Servant.
I'm not sure of the details, but I do know that Lip is a hardworking and sincere lady. Yet she seems to be a bit shy, so it's probably best for you to be supportive of her.

voiceLines.name: Conversation 13
voiceLines.subtitle:
Barghest, the mythical dog from Irish folklore.
Her armor seems to resemble mine... Is she a fan of mine?
She really does have an impressive build. If only Gareth could grow to be even half of Barghest's size...

voiceLines.name: Conversation 14
voiceLines.subtitle:
Sir Percival. The proud protector.
He was the one the Knights of the Round Table trusted most. Even I felt at ease when I was around him, and I even confided in him.
...Ah, that brings back memories. Come to think of it, it must have been the golden age of the Round Table when he was well and active.

voiceLines.name: During an Event
voiceLines.subtitle:
I understand that we're about to go to war.
An event, I believe it was called?

voiceLines.name: Birthday
voiceLines.subtitle:
I wish you many blessings on your birthday...
I hope today is a pleasant one.

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_G010]How wonderful!

voiceLines.name: Ascension 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_G020]Is it time to change my armor?

voiceLines.name: Ascension 1
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100700_0_G030]It's like I'm overflowing with power.
[id 100700_0_G031]I am bound to improve soon.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_G040]Looks like it's about time I get serious.

voiceLines.name: Ascension 4
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_G050]On my name as the Knight of the Sun, [id 100700_0_G051]I shall deliver victory to you!

voiceLines.name: Summon
text: Knight of the Round Table, Gawain.
[sr]I look forward to working with you.
voiceLines.subtitle:
Knight of the Round Table, Gawain.
I look forward to working with you.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Now, expose yourself under the sun.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Time for an honest duel!

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 3
voiceLines.subtitle: What an impressive enemy lineup. I have no complaints.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 4
voiceLines.subtitle: I will accept your surrender anytime. If you are innocent, that is.

voiceLines.name: Skill 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B080]I'll take your breath away!

voiceLines.name: Skill 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B090]Morning light, protect all that is good!

voiceLines.name: Skill 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B480]This is the decisive moment!

voiceLines.name: Skill 4
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B490]Wicked thoughts must be removed!

voiceLines.name: Skill 5
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B880]I merely return what has been given.

voiceLines.name: Skill 6
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B890]My drowsiness has finally subsided!

voiceLines.name: Command Card 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B180]Leave it to me.

voiceLines.name: Command Card 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B200]Understood.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B210]Sacred Sword, unsheathed...

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_0_B220]I still may not be as good as our king, but I will try!

voiceLines.name: Attack 1
voiceLines.subtitle: There!

voiceLines.name: Attack 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Unh!

voiceLines.name: Attack 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Hah!

voiceLines.name: Attack 4
voiceLines.subtitle: Destroy!

voiceLines.name: Attack 5
voiceLines.subtitle: I will not take it easy!

voiceLines.name: Attack 6
voiceLines.subtitle: Please!

voiceLines.name: Attack 7
voiceLines.subtitle: O flame!

voiceLines.name: Attack 8
voiceLines.subtitle: Heading straight at you!

voiceLines.name: Attack 9
voiceLines.subtitle: Mnnngh!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: Take this!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: Nungh, nungh, nungh...punishment!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.subtitle: Just burn, already!

voiceLines.name: Damage 1
voiceLines.subtitle: Ngggghhhh!

voiceLines.name: Damage 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Huh?!

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 1
voiceLines.subtitle: I underestimated you...

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Ugh... How regrettable...

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 3
voiceLines.subtitle: The weather was not...favorable...

voiceLines.name: Victory 1
voiceLines.subtitle: A fine match. You have my gratitude.

voiceLines.name: Victory 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Your performance was rather lacking...

voiceLines.name: Victory 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Combat has ended. We should collect all the dropped materials before we withdraw.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100700_0_B050]This sword is a replica of the sun.
[id 100700_0_B051]Its flame shall cleanse all the impurity of this world.
[id 100700_0_B052]Excalibur Galatine!

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm
voiceLines.subtitle:
[id 100700_0_B800]May night retreat from this brilliance!
[id 100700_0_B801]Its enduring protection shall shine upon this earth...!
[id 100700_0_B802]Excalibur Galatine!

voiceLines.name: About Spiritron Dress
voiceLines.overwriteName: About Spiritron Dress Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle:
I might have some reservations in leaving my responsibilities as a knight, but that is besides the point. I shall enjoy the land of everlasting summer while appreciating what it offers. I would hate for others to think that all knights from Orkney are square, after all.
Hm? That was never a concern as those two were so lively?
...Oh yes, Mordred and Gareth were already here too...

voiceLines.name: Level up
voiceLines.overwriteName: Level up Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_G010]How wonderful!

voiceLines.name: Unlock Wardrobe
voiceLines.overwriteName: Unlock Wardrobe Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_G060]If I'm to accompany Master, [delay 2.1]wearing armor would spoil the summer air. [id 100700_12_G061]And so I followed Gareth's lead and changed into a swimsuit. [id 100700_12_G062]So please do not hesitate to call for me.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 1
voiceLines.overwriteName: Battle Start 1 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: Now then, we will truly bask beneath the sun. Will you be all right with that?

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 2
voiceLines.overwriteName: Battle Start 2 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: Let's do our best, fair and square.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 3
voiceLines.overwriteName: Battle Start 3 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: May you make the best memories this summer.

voiceLines.name: Battle Start 4
voiceLines.overwriteName: Battle Start 4 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: Let's go for a perfect match!

voiceLines.name: Skill 1
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B080]I will take advantage of the opportunity.

voiceLines.name: Skill 2
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B090]O summer rays, restrain my impatience.

voiceLines.name: Skill 3
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B480]Come at me!

voiceLines.name: Skill 4
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B490]I will become a lifeguard!

voiceLines.name: Skill 5
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B880]Heh. I still have much to learn.

voiceLines.name: Skill 6
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B890]My head cannot be taken.

voiceLines.name: Command Card 1
voiceLines.overwriteName: Command Card 1 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B180]Very well.

voiceLines.name: Command Card 2
voiceLines.overwriteName: Command Card 2 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B190]Of course.

voiceLines.name: Command Card 3
voiceLines.overwriteName: Command Card 3 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B200]Time to go a bit wild.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.overwriteName: Noble Phantasm Card 1 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B210]Prepare some sunglasses.

voiceLines.name: Noble Phantasm Card
voiceLines.overwriteName: Noble Phantasm Card 2 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: [id 100700_12_B220]Shall we do it?

voiceLines.name: Attack 1
voiceLines.subtitle: I've taken the head!

voiceLines.name: Attack 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Hah!

voiceLines.name: Attack 3
voiceLines.subtitle: There!

voiceLines.name: Attack 4
voiceLines.subtitle: How's that!?

voiceLines.name: Attack 5
voiceLines.subtitle: Sword, unsheathed!

voiceLines.name: Attack 6
voiceLines.subtitle: Bold ballistic!

voiceLines.name: Attack 7
voiceLines.subtitle: Grand heat flame!

voiceLines.name: Attack 8
voiceLines.subtitle: Too slow!

voiceLines.name: Attack 9
voiceLines.subtitle: Haaah!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.overwriteName: Extra Attack 1 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: Any respite will end this way!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.overwriteName: Extra Attack 2 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: Bravo, considering the enemy!

voiceLines.name: Extra Attack
voiceLines.overwriteName: Extra Attack 3 Noble Son of Summer
voiceLines.subtitle: You must become elated too!

voiceLines.name: Damage 1
voiceLines.subtitle: I'm still determined!

voiceLines.name: Damage 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Too rough!

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 1
voiceLines.subtitle: I can't believe I miscalculated in my pacing...

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 2
voiceLines.subtitle: Sorry, I'm going to take a break.

voiceLines.name: Incapacitated 3
voiceLines.subtitle: I seemed to have taken the summer's sun too lightly...

voiceLines.name: Victory 1
voiceLines.subtitle: I'm sorry. It appears sunblock was meaningless...

voiceLines.name: Victory 2
voiceLines.subtitle: It was a good match. I would like to settle this if and when you are able to stand back up.

voiceLines.name: Victory 3
voiceLines.subtitle: Gawain does not get tired of playing! So please remember that.
